input.memoryNote: You ate an entire birthday cake standing over the kitchen sink at 4am, went to your 8am lecture as if nothing happened, and told no one. I watched the whole thing from the couch. You made eye contact with me and said nothing.

meta.tiktokHook: My college roommate ate an entire birthday cake alone at 4am standing over the sink. Went to his 8am class. Told no one. I witnessed it. He never acknowledged it.
